title: binxr
text: R client Binance REST API (Spot, Futures, Options). Documentation site: https://oliverlds.github.io/binxr/

title: binxr
text: binxr provides lightweight helpers : - Public market data (ticker prices, klines, exchange info) - Authenticated endpoints (account info, positions, order management) - Spot, USD-M futures, options product areas - Data returned data.table easy downstream analysis

title: binxr
code: # From GitHub (using remotes or devtools) remotes::install_github("OliverLDS/binxr")

title: binxr
code: library(binxr)  # Create a config (keys pulled from environment vars by default) cfg <- config_futures()  # Get server time futures_get_server_time(cfg)  # Fetch latest mark price for ETHUSDT futures_get_mark_price("ETHUSDT", cfg)  # Place a limit order (example) futures_place_order(   symbol = "ETHUSDT",   side = "BUY",   type = "LIMIT",   quantity = 0.01,   price = 1800,   time_in_force = "GTC",   config = cfg )  # Spot market data spot_get_ticker_price(symbol = "BTCUSDT", config = config_spot())  # Options market data options_get_mark_price(config = config_options())
